zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wentworth於大約1345年出生在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾時，他的父親John Wentworth57歲，母親Alice Bissett18歲。他於1389年與Agnes Dronsfield在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年10月15日在他的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wentworth于大约1345年出生在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾时，他的父亲John Wentworth57岁，母亲Alice Bissett18岁。他于1389年与Agnes Dronsfield在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年10月15日在他的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wentworth was born about 1345, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Wentworth, was 57 and his mother, Alice Bissett, was 18. He married Agnes Dronsfield in 1389, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 October 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.North Elmsall, West Yorkshire, England,: North Elmsall, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wentworth est né environ 1345, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Wentworth, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Alice Bissett, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Dronsfield en 1389, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wentworth um 1345 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wentworth 57 und seine Mutter Alice Bissett 18. Er hat 1389 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England Agnes Dronsfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1425 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wentworth è nato il circa 1345 nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Wentworth, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Alice Bissett, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Dronsfield nel 1389, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wentworthが約1345年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで生まれた時，父John Wentworthは57歳，母Alice Bissettは18歳であった。1389年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでAgnes Dronsfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年10月15日に故郷で81歳で死去した。

ko.North Elmsall, West Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 노르스 엘사
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wentworth(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wentworth(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Bissett(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1389년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Agnes Dronsfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wentworth nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wentworth, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Alice Bissett, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Dronsfield em 1389, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.North Elmsall, West Yorkshire, England,: норт элмсалл, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wentworth родился около 1345 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wentworth было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Bissett, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Dronsfield в 1389 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 октября 1425 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год.
